noDataDescription: No risk score data is available. Try refreshing.
notEnoughFactors: Not enough factors for radar chart

explanations.privOk: All privileged accounts pass security checks
explanations.privNone: No privileged accounts found to assess
explanations.passwordOk: Password policy meets all recommended thresholds
explanations.kerberosOk: Kerberos configuration meets security best practices
explanations.infraOk: Infrastructure hardening meets security best practices
explanations.certOk: No AD CS security issues detected
explanations.certError: Could not assess AD CS security
explanations.certNone: AD CS not detected in this environment
explanations.gpoAudit: {{count}} GPO(s) found - audit SYSVOL for cpassword entries

recommendations_tpl.reviewHighAlerts: Review {{count}} high-severity alert(s) on privileged accounts
recommendations_tpl.addressCriticalAlerts: Address {{count}} critical alert(s) on privileged accounts
recommendations_tpl.disableInactiveAdmins: Disable or remove {{count}} inactive admin account(s)
recommendations_tpl.reducePrivAccounts: Reduce privileged accounts from {{count}} to fewer than 10
recommendations_tpl.increaseMinPwdLength: Increase minimum password length to 12 or more characters
recommendations_tpl.enableLockout: Enable account lockout after 5-10 failed attempts
recommendations_tpl.reviewStaleAccounts: Review and disable/remove {{count}} stale account(s) (inactive > 90 days)
recommendations_tpl.reviewStaleMachines: Review {{count}} stale machine account(s) with passwords older than 90 days
recommendations_tpl.addProtectedUsers: Add all privileged accounts to the Protected Users group
recommendations_tpl.configureAes: Configure msDS-SupportedEncryptionTypes for AES on all admin accounts
recommendations_tpl.enableAesSpn: Enable AES encryption on all service accounts with SPNs
recommendations_tpl.deployLaps: Deploy LAPS to all workstations and servers
recommendations_tpl.createPsos: Create PSOs for privileged accounts with stronger password requirements
recommendations_tpl.removeCertReqAgent: Remove Certificate Request Agent EKU from: {{templates}}
recommendations_tpl.upgradeV1: Upgrade schema V1 templates to V2+: {{templates}}

disclaimer.checks: 9 risk factors, ~70 individual checks: privileged hygiene, password policy, stale accounts, Kerberos security, dangerous configs, infrastructure hardening, GPO security, trust security, AD CS certificates. CIS Benchmark and MITRE ATT&CK mapped.
disclaimer.limitations: Does not read GPO settings from SYSVOL, does not parse binary ACLs (nTSecurityDescriptor), does not check Kerberos encryption policies at DC level, no network-level checks (SMB signing, LDAP channel binding).
disclaimer.tools: PingCastle (~150 rules), Purple Knight (~185 indicators), or Tenable Identity Exposure for enterprise-grade scoring.
